- Verify all project files are created and properly structured
- Backend (Spring Boot with Maven) ready for build
- Frontend (React with TypeScript and Vite) ready for npm install
- Database configuration file with PostgreSQL settings
- API endpoints defined and documented
- CORS configured for frontend-backend communication
- Ready for development environment setup

To proceed:
1. Ensure Node.js and Java 17+ are installed
2. Create PostgreSQL database: createdb task_manager_db
3. Run: cd backend && mvn spring-boot:run
4. In new terminal: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
